sourceTitle: Undergraduate and Graduate Admissions AI Policy: Guidelines for Fall Applicants
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Caltech students, faculty, and staff are guided by the Honor Code and policies of AI use as an academic tool by students will be determined by individual departments and/or individual faculty.
